display.purpose: One per screen: the page title. Newsreader serif.

headline.purpose: Section and weighty dialog titles. Serif.

title.purpose: Card titles, row primary text. Sans 600.

shadows.name: paper-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards and inputs at rest. Barely perceptible.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for entrances and state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Counsel Ink fill. One per view region.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.17 0.008 90); color: oklch(0.985 0.005 90); height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; font: 500 0.875rem/1 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.17 0.008 90 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.5 0.012 90 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Default for toolbars and row actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.17 0.008 90); height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; font: 500 0.875rem/1 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.965 0.006 90); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.5 0.012 90 / 0.5); }

components.name: State Badge
components.description: Bronze state cue: committed, audited, agent-made.
components.css: .ds-badge-state { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: oklch(0.94 0.025 75); color: oklch(0.45 0.09 75); padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; font: 500 0.75rem/1.3 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: State Dot Row
components.description: Quieter lifecycle cue for dense tables: tinted dot + label.
components.css: .ds-state-dot-row { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; color: oklch(0.5 0.012 90); font: 500 0.75rem/1.3 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; } .ds-state-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.55 0.09 75); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Raised Paper, paper-lift shadow, no border.
components.html:
Acme Corp — Series B

4 open reviews, last commit 2 hours ago by agent.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.999 0.003 90); border-radius: 0.875rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0.17 0.008 90 / 0.05); } .ds-card-title { font: 600 1rem/1.4 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; color: oklch(0.17 0.008 90); margin-bottom: 0.375rem; } .ds-card-body { font: 400 0.875rem/1.6 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; color: oklch(0.5 0.012 90); margin: 0; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Hairline border, soft 3px focus ring, no glow.
components.css: .ds-input { background: oklch(0.999 0.003 90); color: oklch(0.17 0.008 90); border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.007 90); border-radius: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; font: 400 0.875rem/1.6 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.5 0.012 90); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.5 0.012 90); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.5 0.012 90 / 0.3); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Ghost row; active = ink text + sunken fill + bronze dot.
components.html: ClientsMattersDocuments
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; width: 200px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.375rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: oklch(0.5 0.012 90); font: 500 0.8125rem/1.3 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.965 0.006 90); color: oklch(0.17 0.008 90); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: oklch(0.965 0.006 90); color: oklch(0.17 0.008 90); } .ds-nav-dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.55 0.09 75); }

components.name: Page Header
components.description: Serif page title + soft description; hairline base rule.
components.html:
Matters

Every change is a commit with author and blame.
components.css: .ds-page-header { border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.007 90); padding-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-page-title { font: 500 2rem/1.15 'Newsreader Variable', Georgia, serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: oklch(0.17 0.008 90); margin: 0 0 0.25rem; } .ds-page-desc { font: 400 0.875rem/1.6 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; color: oklch(0.5 0.012 90); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: A calm counsel's office. Warm ivory paper, dark ink, serif headings; the document on the desk gets the light. The interface is the room, not the conversation: it holds the work steady and never raises its voice. Where Harvey is cream-corporate and Legora is stone-cool, gitmatter is the more breathable child of both: fewer boxes, wider margins, hierarchy carried by type instead of chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Warm ivory neutrals tinted toward hue 90; never pure white or black.
Serif (Newsreader) for page identity, sans (Geist) for everything operational.
Whitespace separates; hairlines confirm; boxes are a last resort.
One quiet accent (bronze) reserved for state cues: ≤10% of any screen.
Soft ambient elevation: barely-there shadows that read as paper lift, not floating panels.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Bronze appears on at most 10% of any screen. If two bronze elements sit in the same view region, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The No Pure Extremes Rule
rules.body: #fff and #000 are forbidden. Every neutral carries the hue-90 tint, light and dark theme alike.

rules.name: The Serif Earns It Rule
rules.body: Serif is reserved for identity (page titles, document names, marketing headlines) and quoted legal text. Buttons, nav, tables, and form controls are always sans.

rules.name: The Two-Step Rule
rules.body: Adjacent hierarchy levels differ by both size and weight, never size alone.

rules.name: The Millimeter Rule
rules.body: If a shadow is noticeable at a glance, it is too strong. Shadows confirm edges; they never create drama.

dos: Do tint every neutral toward hue 90; the page is ivory (oklch(0.985 0.005 90)), not white.
Do carry hierarchy with type scale + weight; remove a border before adding one.
Do keep bronze under 10% of any screen and tied to state meaning, never decoration.
Do give legal text the serif and the full 70ch measure; it is the hero.
Do meet WCAG AA: 4.5:1 body text, visible 3px focus rings, prefers-reduced-motion honored.
donts: Don't ship the generic shadcn/SaaS look: default gray theme, identical card grids, hero metrics, gradient buttons.
Don't recreate dense enterprise legal chrome (iManage, Westlaw): cramped toolbars, tiny text, borders on everything.
Don't drift dark-techy: neon on black, glassmorphism, 'AI sparkle' gradients. Agent activity is marked with quiet bronze, not magic sparkles.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as accent), gradient text, or modals as the first answer; prefer inline and progressive disclosure.
Don't put serif in buttons, nav, tables, or controls. The Serif Earns It Rule.
